products.name: Lumière Fluted Glass Table Lamp
products.shortDescription: Fluted glass table lamp with a warm linen shade for soft, ambient light.
products.description: The Lumière table lamp pairs a hand-finished fluted glass base with a natural linen shade, casting a soft, diffused glow that flatters any room. A weighted base keeps it steady on a console or bedside table, and the in-line dimmer lets you set the mood from a gentle wash to a reading light. Sold ready to use with an energy-efficient bulb.
products.metaTitle: Lumière Fluted Glass Table Lamp | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A fluted glass table lamp with linen shade and dimmer — soft, ambient light for bedside or console. Shop THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Aurelia Ribbed Ceramic Vase
products.shortDescription: Hand-thrown ribbed ceramic vase with a soft matte glaze.
products.description: Aurelia is a sculptural, hand-thrown vase with deep vertical ribbing and a soft matte glaze that catches the light beautifully. Generous enough for a full bouquet yet just as striking on its own, it brings quiet texture to a mantel, console or dining table. Each piece is individually finished, so subtle variations are part of its charm.
products.metaTitle: Aurelia Ribbed Ceramic Vase | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: Hand-thrown ribbed ceramic vase with a soft matte glaze, in ivory, clay and charcoal. Shop THIS Interiors décor, Dubai.

products.name: Noor Brass Arc Floor Lamp
products.shortDescription: Sweeping arc floor lamp with a marble base and brass stem.
products.description: Noor makes a quiet statement: a slender metal stem arcs gracefully over a sofa or reading chair, finished with a solid stone base for balance. The adjustable head directs a pool of warm light exactly where you want it, while the sculptural silhouette earns its place even when switched off. A foot-dimmer keeps controls effortless.
products.metaTitle: Noor Brass Arc Floor Lamp | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A sweeping arc floor lamp with marble base and adjustable head — warm reading light and a sculptural silhouette. THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Métropole Round Wall Mirror
products.shortDescription: Slim-framed round wall mirror that opens up any room.
products.description: A clean, slim metal frame wraps a generous round mirror to bounce light and visually double a space. Métropole is equally at home above a console, in an entryway, or leaning into a gallery wall. Arrives with secure cleat fixings for a flush, floating look on the wall.
products.metaTitle: Métropole Round Wall Mirror | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A slim-framed round wall mirror in brass or black, 70cm or 90cm — opens up entryways and living rooms. THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Dune Washed Linen Cushion Cover
products.shortDescription: Stonewashed pure-linen cushion cover with a hidden zip.
products.description: Cut from pure stonewashed linen, the Dune cover has a relaxed, lived-in softness from the very first day. A concealed zip keeps the look clean, and the earthy palette is made to layer — mix sand, clay and sage across a sofa or bed. Cover only; pad sold separately. 50 × 50 cm.
products.metaTitle: Dune Washed Linen Cushion Cover | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: Stonewashed pure-linen cushion cover in five earthy tones with a hidden zip. Layer your sofa with THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Atlas Marble & Brass Serving Tray
products.shortDescription: Natural marble tray with slim brass handles.
products.description: A slab of genuine marble framed by slim brass handles, Atlas turns an ottoman, bar cart or kitchen island into something considered. Use it to corral candles and a carafe, or to serve in style. Natural stone veining means no two trays are exactly alike. Wipe clean with a soft, dry cloth.
products.metaTitle: Atlas Marble & Brass Serving Tray | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A natural marble serving tray with slim brass handles, in white or green marble. Style your ottoman with THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Maison Oud Scented Candle
products.shortDescription: Hand-poured soy candle with a refined oud fragrance.
products.description: Maison is a hand-poured soy-blend candle housed in a reusable ribbed glass vessel. The signature Oud & Amber pour opens with warm spice and settles into soft resin and amber — an evening in Dubai, captured. Around 50 hours of clean, even burn. Trim the wick before each light for the best throw.
products.metaTitle: Maison Oud Scented Candle | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: Hand-poured soy candle in a reusable glass vessel — oud, fig and rose pours with ~50hr burn. THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Sahara Handwoven Wool Rug
products.shortDescription: Handwoven wool rug with a tonal, low-pile geometric weave.
products.description: Handwoven from pure wool, Sahara grounds a room with a soft, low pile and a subtle tonal geometry inspired by desert light. Wool is naturally resilient and stain-resistant, so it wears beautifully in living and dining rooms alike. Use a rug pad underneath to keep it flat and in place.
products.metaTitle: Sahara Handwoven Wool Rug | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A handwoven pure-wool rug with a tonal, low-pile weave, in three sizes. Ground your room with THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Terra Fluted Stoneware Planter
products.shortDescription: Fluted stoneware planter with a drainage plug.
products.description: Terra is a substantial fluted planter in tactile stoneware, sized to give statement plants a home indoors. A removable drainage plug lets you plant directly or drop in a nursery pot, and the matte glaze sits beautifully against greenery. Felt feet protect floors and shelves.
products.metaTitle: Terra Fluted Stoneware Planter | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A fluted stoneware planter with drainage plug, in chalk and terracotta. Bring greenery indoors with THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Aria Pillar Candle Holders, Set of 2
products.shortDescription: A pair of solid-metal pillar candle holders in two heights.
products.description: Aria is a coordinated pair of solid-metal pillar holders in two heights, designed to be grouped for an easy, layered tablescape. Weighted bases keep them stable, and wide dishes catch any drips. Style them with pillar candles on a mantel, sideboard or dining table.
products.metaTitle: Aria Pillar Candle Holders, Set of 2 | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A pair of solid-metal pillar candle holders in brass or black, two heights. Build a tablescape with THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Lustre Reactive-Glaze Serving Bowl
products.shortDescription: Large stoneware bowl with a flowing reactive glaze.
products.description: Each Lustre bowl is finished in a flowing reactive glaze that pools and shifts in the kiln, so every piece is one of a kind. Generous and footed, it works as a centrepiece, a fruit bowl, or a catch-all for the entryway. Food-safe and dishwasher-friendly stoneware.
products.metaTitle: Lustre Reactive-Glaze Serving Bowl | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A large footed stoneware bowl with a flowing reactive glaze, in ocean or ember. A one-of-a-kind centrepiece from THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Sereno Bouclé Knit Throw
products.shortDescription: Plush bouclé throw with a soft fringed edge.
products.description: Sereno is a deep, textural bouclé throw with a softly fringed edge — the kind you reach for the moment the evening cools. Generously sized to drape a sofa or layer at the foot of a bed, in a palette built to sit with our linen cushions. Gentle cold wash; reshape and dry flat.
products.metaTitle: Sereno Bouclé Knit Throw | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A plush fringed bouclé throw in cream, stone and moss to layer your sofa. Shop THIS Interiors textiles, Dubai.

products.name: Vista Framed Botanical Prints, Set of 3
products.shortDescription: A trio of framed botanical prints, ready to hang.
products.description: Vista is a curated set of three botanical studies, giclée-printed on textured art paper and framed behind glass with a generous mount. Designed to hang together as an instant gallery wall, they bring calm, organic line-work to a living room, hallway or study. Arrives ready to hang with fixings included.
products.metaTitle: Vista Framed Botanical Prints, Set of 3 | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A trio of framed botanical prints in oak, black or brass — an instant gallery wall, ready to hang. THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Galleria Brass Photo Frames, Set of 4
products.shortDescription: A set of four metal photo frames in mixed sizes.
products.description: Galleria is a coordinated set of four slim metal frames in mixed sizes, made to cluster on a shelf or build out a gallery wall. Each frame holds glass and a removable mount, so prints sit crisp and centred. Includes both tabletop easels and wall hooks.
products.metaTitle: Galleria Brass Photo Frames, Set of 4 | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A set of four slim metal photo frames in mixed sizes, brass or black — for shelf or wall. THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Celeste Resin Abstract Sculpture
products.shortDescription: A sculptural objet with a smooth, hand-finished form.
products.description: Celeste is a tactile abstract sculpture cast in solid resin and hand-finished to a smooth, stone-like surface. Its fluid form draws the eye on a shelf, console or stack of books, adding a gallery note without taking up a footprint. A felted base protects surfaces.
products.metaTitle: Celeste Resin Abstract Sculpture | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A hand-finished abstract sculpture in ivory or bronze — a gallery note for a shelf or console. THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Horizon Silent Mantel Clock
products.shortDescription: A wood-framed mantel clock with a silent sweep movement.
products.description: Horizon brings a quiet, mid-century calm to a mantel or shelf, with a solid wood frame and a clean, legible face. The silent sweep movement means no ticking in a still room. Runs on a single AA battery (included). Free-standing — no wall fixing needed.
products.metaTitle: Horizon Silent Mantel Clock | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A wood-framed mantel clock with a silent sweep movement, in walnut or black oak. THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Meridian Abstract Canvas, Set of 3
products.shortDescription: A triptych of gallery-wrapped abstract canvases.
products.description: Meridian is a three-panel abstract triptych, gallery-wrapped over solid timber stretcher bars so it hangs frameless and contemporary. The warm, layered palette anchors a sofa or bed and reads as one continuous composition across the three panels. Ready to hang with fixings included.
products.metaTitle: Meridian Abstract Canvas, Set of 3 | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A gallery-wrapped abstract triptych in indigo or earth tones — frameless, ready to hang. THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Atlas Brass Bookends, Pair
products.shortDescription: A weighty pair of solid-metal bookends.
products.description: A clean, architectural pair of solid-metal bookends with felt-lined bases that grip the shelf and protect it. Substantial enough to hold a row of hardbacks upright, sculptural enough to style with a few favourites and an objet. Sold as a pair.
products.metaTitle: Atlas Brass Bookends, Pair | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A weighty, architectural pair of solid-metal bookends with felt-lined bases. Style your shelves with THIS Interiors, Dubai.

products.name: Émaux Stoneware Ginger Jar
products.shortDescription: A lidded stoneware ginger jar with a crackle glaze.
products.description: Émaux reinterprets the classic ginger jar in tactile stoneware, finished with a soft crackle glaze and a snug fitted lid. Display it solo as a sculptural accent, group it in odd numbers along a shelf, or let it hold dried stems. A timeless silhouette with a quiet, modern finish.
products.metaTitle: Émaux Stoneware Ginger Jar | THIS Interiors
products.metaDescription: A lidded stoneware ginger jar with a soft crackle glaze — a timeless, sculptural accent. THIS Interiors, Dubai.

reviews.title: Beautiful weight and finish
reviews.body: The glaze is even lovelier in person and the ribbing catches the light beautifully. It feels substantial and well made — exactly the quiet statement piece I was after for the console. Branches and dried stems look wonderful in it.

reviews.title: Gorgeous, warm glow
reviews.body: Casts the softest light and the dimmer is perfect for evenings. The fluted glass looks far more expensive than it was. Packaging was excellent too — arrived without a scratch.

reviews.title: Soft underfoot and stunning
reviews.body: The wool is dense and soft, and the tonal pattern hides everyday life with two kids. It completely grounded our living room. Worth every dirham.

reviews.title: Makes the hallway feel bigger
reviews.body: Lovely slim frame and the brass is a warm, brushed tone rather than shiny. Bounces so much light into our entryway. Fixings were easy. Half a star off only because I wish the 90cm came in a few more finishes.

reviews.title: The scent fills the room
reviews.body: Oud & Amber is rich without being overpowering, and the burn has been clean and even. The glass is gorgeous enough to reuse afterwards. Already on my second.

reviews.title: Lovely set, great quality
reviews.body: Prints are crisp and the frames feel solid. They made an easy gallery wall above the sofa. Waiting on my second set for the hallway.

reviews.title: Bought a second one
reviews.body: So good I came back for the charcoal as well. Pairs perfectly with the ginger jar. Quick delivery across the UAE.

leads.notes: Shared Aramex tracking details with the customer

leads.message: Do you have the Sahara Handwoven Wool Rug available in the runner size? The site shows it but I wanted to confirm before ordering.
leads.notes: Confirmed runner is in stock; awaiting reply

leads.notes: Refunded to store credit; return collected.
